positive: Stylized minimalist abstract portrait of a majestic golden retriever puppy sitting in a field of glowing bioluminescent wildflowers at twilight. The puppy has a clean, powerful silhouette with joyful, inquisitive posture. Use a high-contrast vector illustration style mixed with soft gradient airbrushing. Focus on clean lines, strong central composition, and a limited, saturated color palette of deep indigo, gold, and emerald green. Cinematic, symmetrical composition, print-on-demand quality, perfect for apparel.
